# OpenXiv

> AT-Protocol preprint server. Preprints federate to Bluesky. Typed endorsements, Trust Passport, AI disclosure, three explainer tiers per paper. Open to independent researchers. ISSN 3120-9556, founded 2026-05-18, operated by David Alfyorov from Vilnius, Lithuania.

OpenXiv publishes preprints as AT-proto records under the app.openxiv.* namespace. Authors sign in with ORCID or did:plc through Bluesky. There is no endorsement gate, no institutional-email check, and no affiliation filter. Submissions go through a pipeline that screens for unverified or hallucinated content; refused work gets a public refusal packet that names the failure mode, and the author can revise and resubmit. AI use is welcome at four declared levels (none, assistant, coauthor, primary); hidden AI use is a policy violation.

## Core pages

- [About OpenXiv](https://openxiv.net/about): mission, features, federation, AI policy.
- [FAQ](https://openxiv.net/faq): 18 self-contained answers to common questions.
- [Glossary](https://openxiv.net/glossary): 22 terms covering AT Protocol, identifiers, and OpenXiv concepts.
- [Endorsement vocabulary](https://openxiv.net/vocabulary): the six typed endorsement verbs.
- [How to submit](https://openxiv.net/docs/how-to-submit): step-by-step submission flow.
- [Press kit](https://openxiv.net/press): fact sheet, founder bio, logos.
- [Transparency report](https://openxiv.net/transparency): all moderation and legal actions.

## Comparisons

- [OpenXiv vs arXiv](https://openxiv.net/compare/arxiv)
- [OpenXiv vs bioRxiv](https://openxiv.net/compare/biorxiv)
- [OpenXiv vs SSRN](https://openxiv.net/compare/ssrn)
- [OpenXiv vs Research Square](https://openxiv.net/compare/researchsquare)
- [OpenXiv vs ChemRxiv](https://openxiv.net/compare/chemrxiv)

## Policies

- [Policies index](https://openxiv.net/policies)
- [Code of conduct](https://openxiv.net/policies/code-of-conduct)
- [Submission policy](https://openxiv.net/policies/submission)
- [Metadata policy](https://openxiv.net/policies/metadata): metadata is CC0.
- [Content / item policy](https://openxiv.net/policies/items): CC-BY-4.0 default.
- [Preservation policy](https://openxiv.net/policies/preservation)
- [Takedown & withdrawal policy](https://openxiv.net/policies/takedown)
- [Jurisdictional restrictions](https://openxiv.net/policies/jurisdictional-restrictions)
- [DORA commitment](https://openxiv.net/policies/dora-commitment)

## Machine surfaces

- [Sitemap](https://openxiv.net/sitemap.xml)
- [Atom feed (all papers)](https://openxiv.net/feed.atom)
- [OAI-PMH base](https://openxiv.net/oai-pmh)
- [Full markdown corpus](https://openxiv.net/llms-full.txt)
- [Identifier registration (ISSN portal)](https://portal.issn.org/resource/ISSN/3120-9556)

## License

Bibliographic metadata is CC0. Papers are licensed by their authors at submission (CC-BY-4.0 default). This llms.txt is CC0.
